name: Rice Batter Bread II
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Am Largely Brown Rice Flour
1/4 cup Potato Starch or other flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients in one bowl and the liquid ingredients in another.
2. Combine both mixtures gently.
3. Pour into an oiled and floured 4-inch by 8-inch loaf pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 45-50 minutes.
5. Let cool completely in the pan.
